summary: Iteration 23 testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend: 13/13 tests passed for Zones CRUD API (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/zones). Frontend: Zones page loads zones from MongoDB API, shows 'Live' WebSocket indicator, CRUD operations work via modal. Reports page shows 'Zone / Adresse' column with zone names from LocationObjectname field.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/zones - creates zone in MongoDB (circle and polygon)
Backend: GET /api/zones - lists all zones from MongoDB
Backend: PUT /api/zones/{id} - updates zone with updated_at timestamp
Backend: Zone data validation with defaults applied
Backend: Existing 'Zone Test Cercle' persists in MongoDB
Frontend: Zones page loads zones from API (shows 'Zone Test Cercle')
Frontend: 'Live' WebSocket indicator visible in header
Frontend: Stats bar shows counts for Chantier, Dépôt, Zone restreinte, Parking, Cercles, Polygones
Frontend: 'Nouvelle zone' modal opens with shape selector (Cercle/Polygone)
Frontend: Radius slider visible when Cercle selected
Frontend: Creating zone via modal calls POST /api/zones and zone appears in list
Frontend: Zone persists in MongoDB after creation
Frontend: Reports page loads with 200 assets from external API
Frontend: Report builder has Asset/Site type selector
Frontend: Report generation shows 'Zone / Adresse' column with zone names (LocationObjectname)
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumZones.jsx: Well-implemented API integration with fetchZones() using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
PremiumZones.jsx: WebSocket integration for real-time updates (zone_created, zone_updated, zone_deleted events)
PremiumZones.jsx: Proper fallback to DEFAULT_ZONES only when API fails or returns empty
PremiumReports.jsx: buildReport() correctly uses item.LocationObjectname || item.locationName for zone, item.address || item.nearestLocationName for address fallback
PremiumReports.jsx: isAddress flag properly set to show orange badge (.rpt-badge-addr) when no zone exists
server.py: Zones CRUD endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
server.py: WebSocket broadcast on zone create/update/delete for real-time sync
seed_data_creation: Zone 'Zone Test Cercle' already exists in MongoDB from previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 Zones MongoDB integration fully tested. Key data-testids: zones-title, zones-stats, zones-add-btn, zones-map, zones-list, zone-item-{n}, zone-detail-drawer, zone-edit-modal, zone-shape-selector, shape-circle-btn, shape-polygon-btn, zone-radius-slider, zone-save-btn. Reports page data-testids: reports-title, report-builder, report-type-asset, report-type-site, report-items-panel, report-config-panel, report-build-btn, report-result, report-summary. Zones API: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/zones. WebSocket events: zone_created, zone_updated, zone_deleted.

zones_api_crud.details: All CRUD operations persist to MongoDB (test_database.zones collection)

zones_frontend_api_integration.details: Frontend fetches zones from /api/zones, creates/updates/deletes via API

zones_create_modal.details: Modal with shape selector, radius slider, type dropdown, color picker, alert toggles

reports_zone_address_column.details: 'Zone / Adresse' column shows LocationObjectname (zone) or address fallback with orange badge
